emails.subject: RE: TW Forecast
emails.body: RE: TW Forecast We have notified all parties within NNG TW to avoid, and, or stop all expenditures that don't negatively impact safety, security, regulatory, legal, contractural obligations. Our hope is that this will enable us to meet this unplanned overage.
